triples.subject: BYD
triples.sentence: BYD has surpassed Tesla in the last Quarter 2024 as top-selling electric car seller.

triples.subject: Tesla
triples.sentence: As of recent data, Tesla holds a significant portion of the EV market share in the United States, with approximately 50.9% of the EV market as of the last quarter of 2023.

triples.subject: China
triples.sentence: with China leading the way with 60% of global electric car sales.
